items.title: Is Honeywell International (HON) Pricing In Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Performance?
items.description: If you are wondering whether Honeywell International's current share price fairly reflects its long term potential, you are not alone. This article is designed to help you frame that question clearly. The stock last closed at US$248.04, with returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 9.0% over 30 days, 26.6% year to date, 26.8% over 1 year and 42.5% over 3 years, plus 40.4% over 5 years. This gives important context before thinking about value. Recently, investors have been watching Honeywell as it...

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips As Trump Says This On Iran; Warren Buffett Stock Flashes Sell Signal (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index fell and other indexes were mixed after President Trump spoke on Iran. A Warren Buffett stock dived but Palantir popped. Oil and defense stocks rose.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Lags As Trump Says This On Iran; LNG Stock Clears Entry As Oil Prices Pop (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index was off opening lows on the stock market today after U.S.-Iran attacks. Tesla fell but oil and defense stocks rose.

items.title: Here's Why You Should Retain Honeywell Stock in Your Portfolio
items.description: HON rides 13% commercial aviation aftermarket growth and defense strength, even as Industrial Automation weakness and rising debt weigh on results.

items.title: Assessing Honeywell International (HON) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
items.description: Why Honeywell International (HON) is on investors’ radar today Honeywell International (HON) has recently drawn attention after a solid share price move over the past month and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess how its current fundamentals line up. See our latest analysis for Honeywell International. The recent 30 day share price return of 7.06% and 90 day gain of 26.11% have pushed Honeywell International to US$243.59.
